narrative:
Wauseon Three (precinct in Fulton County) has 898 registered voters, with 60.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.3 percentage points.
